TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sinvi i Chiayi a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Sinvi. u kasalumaluma' nu Sinvi sa, 128 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 375 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 350 ku tademaw, pakalatu 93%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 25 ku tademaw, pakalatu 7%. u kasabinacadan, Cou 89%, Bunun 3%, Tayal 1%, Amis 1%.
S.PHON: sin*i i ʦħiaji a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu sin*i. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu sin*i sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, ʦou **%, bunun *%, tajar~ɾ *%, amis *%.
S.FORM: Sinvi i Chiayi a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Sinvi. u kasalumaluma' nu Sinvi sa, 128 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 375 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 350 ku tademaw, pakalatu 93%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 25 ku tademaw, pakalatu 7%. u kasabinacadan, Cou 89%, Bunun 3%, Tayal 1%, Amis 1%.
S.PHON: sin*i i ʦħiaji a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu sin*i. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu sin*i sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, ʦou **%, bunun *%, tajar~ɾ *%, amis *%.
